overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing the protagonist Basim walking through a sunlit medieval Baghdad marketplace and courtyard. The character moves from narrow market streets through an open plaza with Islamic architecture and wades through a decorative fountain pool.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with adobe buildings and vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a busy market street, passing vendors and pedestrians in robes

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes walking in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: tan adobe building with wooden door and balcony with lattice work
adobe building with decorative lattice windows and climbing vines
wooden market stall displaying clay pots and ceramic jars
tall palm tree providing shade over the street ahead
large pile of pink and purple flowers on the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow market street lined with tan adobe buildings. A wooden stall displaying clay pots sits on the right, while pedestrians in period robes walk in various directions. Palm trees and flowering bushes add greenery to the sandy-colored environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with Islamic architecture and central plaza

events.description: exits narrow market street into open courtyard with large central tree and grand building

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward a large building with arches, navigating around groups of NPCs

notable_agents.action: group of guards in red robes standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: large stone building with multiple arches, columns, and intricate Islamic architectural details
large mature tree with dense green canopy in the plaza center
building with wooden lattice veranda covered in green vines

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit courtyard with a grand building featuring Islamic arches ahead. A large olive tree dominates the center of the plaza. The character passes a wooden veranda on the left and approaches a group of guards in red robes near the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden courtyard with tiered fountain pools

events.description: approaching the water feature with tiered fountain pools and decorative channels

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a decorative water feature, approaching the tiered fountain pools

entered.detail: rectangular water pool with stone tiers, blue decorative tiles, and central fountain structure
upper floor balcony with blue and gold decorative tiles and wooden screens
bushes with vibrant purple flowers lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a garden area with dense vegetation and a prominent tiered fountain pool. The water feature has blue decorative tiles and multiple levels. Purple flowering bushes line the path, and a building with ornate blue and gold balcony details appears on the left.

events.description: character steps into the shallow water and begins wading through the fountain pool
character climbs out of the water onto the stone steps on the far side

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow fountain water, then climbing out onto the stone pavement on the other side

notable_agents.action: NPC sitting on the fountain edge with another person nearby

entered.detail: stone steps leading up from the water feature to the building entrance
building facade with prominent red wooden doors and stone columns

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow water of the fountain pool, wading through the clear water with visible tiles beneath. After crossing the pool, the character climbs onto stone steps leading to a building with red wooden doors. NPCs sit along the fountain edge in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, narrow market street into a serene, ornate courtyard and garden. It begins by weaving through a sandy-colored alley lined with adobe buildings and clay pot stalls, where pedestrians in period robes move among palm trees and flowering bushes. As the path opens, the scene expands into a sunlit plaza dominated by a large olive tree and grand Islamic arches, passing a wooden veranda and guards in red robes. The camera then shifts into a lush garden area filled with dense vegetation and purple flowers, moving toward a tiered fountain pool adorned with blue decorative tiles and a building with gold balcony details. Finally, the character wades through the clear, shallow water of the pool before climbing stone steps toward red wooden doors as NPCs linger along the fountain's edge.
